title: clinopodium vernayanum
intro: Clinopodium vernayanum, also known as the Khas or Indian hyssop, is a perennial herb native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium vernayanum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a herbal tea or oil, which are believed to promote overall well-being and aid in the recovery from various health conditions.
